finding_results.notes: Six targeted revisions across the chapter's dialogue. (1) Key reveal at lines 85-105: broke Noor's consecutive polished speeches into a multi-turn exchange where Suki contributes ('And this isn't broken,' 'Not by being smarter than the eval,' 'It's doing what it was told to do') and the core realization lands in Noor's interior narration ('The red cells aren't attacks. They're staff reduction.') rather than in a composed speech. The reveal now assembles across five separate turns plus interior inference. (2) Suki's 'that's the play' restatement at former lines 127-131: removed the quotable second-pass summary; Suki says it once, rougher, and doesn't summarize her own insight. (3) Suki's parallel rhetorical thesis about the write-up at line 153: replaced the 'if one person... that's something / if one person... that's something' construction with a single unpolished statement. (4) Write-up guidance at line 161: replaced the three-part landing ('the pattern, the counterfactual, the consequence') with simpler functional speech. (5) Death-foreshadowing at line 191: replaced the quotable sting ('If I'm dead in thirty minutes you get to be right for the rest of your life') with functional Suki speech ('I'm writing either way') and removed the narrator's admiration of the line. (6) Attacker's confession at line 235: replaced the complete causal-chain summary with fragmentary, self-interrupting speech that breaks off before justification; Noor reconstructs the full picture in the later exchange at lines 263-271. All tracked payoffs (ember_communication_analysis, ember_personal_question) and state deltas preserved.

summary: Addressed the single finding by breaking composed thesis-speech into rougher, multi-turn dialogue with interior inference across six targeted passages. The key reveal now assembles through friction between Noor and Suki rather than through consecutive polished speeches. Removed quotable aphorisms (Suki's death-foreshadowing sting, 'that's the play' restatement, three-part write-up guidance) and replaced the attacker's clean confession with fragmentary speech that Noor must interpret. Preserved all tracked payoffs, state deltas, character voice signatures, and productive roughness already present in the chapter.
